title: Article 40. Continuances
doc_html:
§140. Article 40. Continuances

            The military judge or a summary court-martial may, for reasonable cause, grant a continuance to any party for such time, and as often, as may appear to be just.

            Acts 1974, No. 621, §1; Acts 2019, No. 373, §1.
doc_text:
§140.  Article 40.  Continuances
The military judge or a summary court-martial may, for reasonable cause, grant a
continuance to any party for such time, and as often, as may appear to be just.
Acts 1974, No. 621, §1; Acts 2019, No. 373, §1.
